vibe: Suspenseful, occult, atmospheric, 'seal your fate' ritual

typography.h1: font-serif text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-white drop-shadow-md
typography.h2: font-serif text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white
typography.label: font-sans text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#E01E26]

spacing_and_layout.ritual_overlay: Fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md
spacing_and_layout.card_container: w-full max-w-md bg-[#0E0E0E]/95 backdrop-blur-3xl border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden

components.progress_indicator: Subtle UI at the top of the card container. Use a thin silver/grey track (h-1 bg-[#2A2A2A]) with a red (#E01E26) fill that animates width per step. Include a 'Back' affordance (text-sm text-silver hover:text-white flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer) on the top left if step > 1.
components.interest_chip: Large, square-ish buttons (aspect-square) with an icon and text. className='bg-[#161616] border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-xl hover:border-[#E01E26] hover:bg-[#E01E26]/10 transition-colors flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 cursor-pointer'.
components.location_input: Shadcn Input, customized: border-b-2 border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-none focus-visible:border-[#E01E26] focus-visible:ring-0 bg-[#161616] text-white text-center text-3xl placeholder:text-[#4A4A4A] py-6 mb-6
components.slider: Shadcn Slider. Track: bg-[#2A2A2A]. Fill: bg-[#E01E26]. Thumb: bg-[#C0C0C0] border-2 border-[#0E0E0E].
components.sub_chip: Pill-shaped toggle (rounded-full px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer). Inactive: bg-[#1C1C1C] border border-[#2A2A2A] text-[#A0A0A0]. Active: bg-[#E01E26] text-white border-transparent.
components.tarot_button_container: relative aspect-[2/3] w-48 mx-auto cursor-pointer perspective-[1000px] mt-8
components.tarot_button: 3D Flip card. Front: intricate silver border, dark texture bg, red glowing text 'Fate Sealed'. Back: Occult symbol or Reaper icon. Below the card: a stylized serif phrase 'Once chosen, your fate is sealed.'
components.action_button: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded solid button for 'Next', 'Use my location', or 'Surprise me'. bg-[#1C1C1C] hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] text-white px-6 py-3 border border-[#2A2A2A] transition-colors

motion_and_interaction.ritual_step_transition: Use Framer Motion 'AnimatePresence' with mode='wait'. Exit: { y: -40, opacity: 0, filter: 'blur(4px)' }. Initial: { y: 40, opacity: 0, filter: 'blur(4px)' }, Animate: { y: 0, opacity: 1, filter: 'blur(0px)' }. Transition: duration 0.4, ease 'easeOut'.
motion_and_interaction.tarot_flip: Framer Motion 3D transform. initial: { rotateY: 0 }, animate (on click): { rotateY: 180, scale: 1.1, boxShadow: '0 0 50px rgba(224,30,38,0.8)' }. Transition: spring, stiffness 60, damping 15.
motion_and_interaction.overlay_dismiss: When the ritual is complete, animate the entire overlay opacity to 0 with a duration of 1s to dramatically reveal the classic app.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hover states must use specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors duration-200, scale-105 for chips) instead of generic `transition-all`.

flow_logic.first_visit_check: On mount in App.js, check localStorage for 'hasCompletedRitual'. If false, show the Ritual Overlay wizard over the main app. If true, hide it.
flow_logic.completion: After Step 4 (Tarot button clicked) -> trigger flip animation -> wait 1.5s -> set localStorage 'hasCompletedRitual' to true -> trigger overlay dismiss animation.

images.description: Dark occult texture for the tarot card background.

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Use 'Playfair Display' for headings (tarot card text, step titles) and 'Inter' for body. Add them to index.html or import via CSS.
IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Work with .js and .jsx files. Do NOT use .tsx. Ensure all React components are valid JSX.

IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Wrap the multi-step ritual inside an AnimatePresence block from Framer Motion. Only ONE step renders at a time to create the window replacement effect requested by the user.

IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Maintain a state 'currentStep' (1 to 4). Step 1 auto-advances onClick. Step 2 has a 'Next' button or 'Use my location'. Step 3 has 'Next' or 'Surprise me'. Step 4 has the Tarot Card.

IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: The Tarot Card must use 3D CSS transforms via Framer Motion (<motion.div style={{ transformStyle: 'preserve-3d' }}>). Make sure the backface is hidden using standard CSS classes.

IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='ritual-step-1', data-testid='interest-food', data-testid='zip-input', data-testid='tarot-button', data-testid='back-button').
IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Do NOT break the existing classic layout! Render this 'Ritual Overlay' conditionally as a fixed z-[100] layer on top of the existing app.

IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Do NOT use a fully transparent background for the card containers (e.g., no bg-transparent). Use bg-[#0E0E0E]/95 backdrop-blur-3xl to ensure content is legible over the background.
IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Implement the Progress indicator as a subtle UI (e.g., 'Step 1 of 4' text or a progress bar) and provide a 'Back' button to return to the previous step (except on step 1).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
